name: Unprotected Primary Channel
description: The product uses a primary communication channel for administration or restricted functionality but does not adequately protect that channel, allowing attackers to intercept, modify, or access sensitive operations transmitted over the unprotected channel.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or EGRESS node carrying administrative or privileged operations over a primary communication channel (HTTP, unencrypted socket) that reaches an AUTH or CONTROL node without a STRUCTURAL node enforcing channel-level protection (TLS, encryption, VPN)
